text.title: Feature Flag Rollout Runbook Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when feature-flag-rollout-runbook is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), a root cause (`reason`), and a corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Rollout reaches 100%, then a critical bug surfaces; rollback impossible because flag was removed.
antipattern.reason: Flag cleaned up before 100% bake-in completed.
antipattern.note: Fix: Bake-in ≥7 days at 100% before flag removal; cleanup PR auto-blocked until then.

antipattern.description: Error rate doubles at 10%; manual rollback delayed 45 minutes 'while we debate'.
antipattern.note: Fix: Wire numeric auto-rollback at 1% and at 10%.

antipattern.description: Flag rotting in code for 18 months; nobody knows if it's active.
antipattern.note: Fix: Reject flag PRs that lack cleanup_due_date; quarterly stale-flag report.
